about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Charbelle Lopes, a tattoo artist based in Abington, MA, specializing in realism, pet portraits, and cover-ups. Every piece I create is a collaboration between your story and my art, transforming meaningful moments into permanent masterpieces on your skin.
about.quote: "Art is not what you see, but what you make others see."

process.title: How It Works
process.step1_desc: Fill out the form with your idea and inspiration images
process.step2_desc: I'll reach out via email within 7 business days with available dates
process.step3_desc: Your custom design is created on the day of your session
process.consultation_note: For complex projects or cover-ups, an optional in-person consultation can be arranged prior to the session.

contact.title: Tell Me About Your Tattoo Idea
contact.subtitle: First contact via email — response within 7 business days.
contact.tattoo_idea_placeholder: Describe your tattoo idea, style preferences, and any meaningful elements...
contact.current_tattoo_hint: Upload a photo of the area to be covered
contact.comments_placeholder: Any other details you'd like to share...
